'''Phlors Rex''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Axum system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by 18 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
